name: input-otp
description: A segmented one-time-code input: N real input slots with auto-advance, backspace/arrow navigation, paste-fill, per-type character filtering (numeric/alphanumeric/alpha), one-time-code autofill on the first slot, and a mirrored hidden input for form submission. Full WAI one-time-password-field ARIA (role=group + per-slot Character N of M labels).
docs: Register <lv-input-otp> by importing components/ui/input-otp.ts from your entry point. Set `length` (default 6), `type` (numeric|alphanumeric|alpha), and `name` to submit the joined value via the mirrored hidden input inside any HTML form. Listen for `lv-input` (current value, possibly partial) and `lv-complete` (fired once all slots are filled). Use `mask` to render password slots, `invalid` for the error ring.
